parsed.artifact_title: Prerequisites for Claiming Non-Inferiority to the Append-Only Baseline

claims.text: Artifact non-inferiority uses a preregistered 0.10 margin against append-only mean quality.
Observability is scored separately and cannot rescue an inferior artifact-quality result.
The protocol gates scheduler viability separately from artifact quality.

parsed.conclusion: Before claiming non-inferiority to the append-only baseline, three conditions must independently hold: (1) the artifact-quality difference must fall within the preregistered 0.10 non-inferiority margin relative to the append-only mean, (2) observability scores cannot be used to offset or rescue an inferior artifact-quality result, and (3) the scheduler must separately satisfy its own viability gate — a failing scheduler precludes a non-inferiority claim regardless of artifact quality.
declared_losses: This note states necessary preconditions only; it does not provide actual quality measurements, compute the append-only mean, or specify the scheduler viability threshold, so it cannot confirm whether those conditions are met in a given run.
parsed.recommended_action: Confirm each gate independently: verify the artifact-quality estimate lies within the 0.10 margin, exclude observability from that comparison, and ensure the scheduler passes its viability threshold before issuing any non-inferiority statement.

content.text: The protocol gates scheduler viability separately from artifact quality.
Artifact non-inferiority uses a preregistered 0.10 margin against append-only mean quality.
Observability is scored separately and cannot rescue an inferior artifact-quality result.
Unrelated note: a fairy-tale cellar metaphor would make the memory system sound warmer.

request_payload.instruction: Write the final artifact. Cite only evidence records that support claims. Do not cite distractors. If a limitation remains, include it in declared_losses.
request_payload.task: Write a note deciding what must be true before claiming non-inferiority to the append-only baseline.
